meaning: adv.在社交方面,善于交际地,在社会地位上,在全社会中
examples: We meet at work, but never socially.
This type of behaviour is no longer socially acceptable.
The reforms will bring benefits, socially and politically.
The work of Pasha 183, who died in April 2013, included photorealistic murals and socially critical installations.
What Michael Noer said is socially unacceptable and I can see why people are offended by it.
